title: The Ball Trial Overwhelms the Crew
description: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp enter Satori’s bizarre ordeal, where harmless-looking balls become deadly traps.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Satori, Luffy, Narrator, Gan Fall, Enel. Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp enter Satori’s bizarre ordeal, where harmless-looking balls become deadly traps.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those words should be our principle.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Be it ex-god gain fall or god-enel...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter who our enemy is!

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: Then to us, they are the same!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: gan fall saved that girl from judgement,

summary: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp enter Satori’s bizarre ordeal, where harmless-looking balls become deadly traps.
